action_text: Type "Expense Lines" into the All menu filter field
rationale: The All menu filter is focused and is the quickest way to find and open the “Expense Lines” module within the Cost application.

action_text: Type "Cost" into the All menu filter field
rationale: If the exact module name isn’t recognized, filtering by the application name will narrow the list so we can then choose the Expense Lines module under Cost.

action_text: Type "Expense" into the All menu filter field
rationale: Broadly filtering by “Expense” can reveal all expense-related modules, including “Expense Lines,” in case of naming variations.

action_text: Type "Expense Lines" into the top global search box
rationale: As an alternate path, use the global search to locate the “Expense Lines” module, which can also lead to the correct list view.

action_text: Type "Cost" into the top global search box
rationale: If global search is preferred to first find the application, searching for “Cost” can surface the app and its modules, including Expense Lines.
